textByHashes.3bd870377d70029da94a7ce567cf13608ffd4b40: Nilsal! I'm actually out here writing reports on the animals of the forest.
textByHashes.ba9eb7b486a6e995138d05df8c9a5a7a5775a999: Well, it would appear that a number of them are somewhat incorporeal...
textByHashes.c4f5611fb15ba858ef130efd8959bf8bf414fea5: Yes, in between avoiding being stepped on by them, I've been trying to see how they interact with the other animals... specifically the corporeal ones.
textByHashes.d95699dad16791dade3be4dc7edaa0cc1dfeb6d5: Truth be told though, they don't really seem to be affected by them. They just keep on their merry way.
textByHashes.3aae6987169f6b0b46ccccfa2f4326823da76766: Oh, are you familiar with the guild?
textByHashes.170b771be9f4c099f93b620955e761a151c53cc0: Good, good. Well, thank you for the offer, but I think I'm good for the moment.
textByHashes.064852bfca6b059754a433731252c9b256a4e92f: Thank you for the offer, but I think I'm good for the moment.
textByHashes.e7251b22ac52d32cb25b83cb8089b37887f53160: Now then. Looking to buy some weaponry?
textByHashes.ae96cd3e9d373144ee8a70aa6107a39c1fc1ae78: I'll be here if you change your mind.
